channel.title: Pirikli | Multilingual Communication Specialist on Pirikli
channel.description: Recent content in Pirikli | Multilingual Communication Specialist on Pirikli

item.title: About
item.description:
Hi, I'm Pirikli (Aboutaleb Nasiri Parouch) — a multilingual communication specialist working across Azerbaijani Turkic, Persian, Turkish, and English.

What I do

Over a decade of senior experience delivering both spoken and written communication at Iran’s Ministry of Interior — from daily face-to-face citizen liaison, VIP protocol, and crisis communication, to official correspondence and analytical briefings at ministerial level.

I work across two channels that are really one skill:
